title: The Krofft Supershow
overview: The Krofft Supershow is a Saturday morning children's variety show, produced by Sid and Marty Krofft. It aired for two seasons from September 11, 1976 to September 2, 1978 on ABC
creator: Marty Krofft

episodes.title: Episode #1.1
episodes.overview: The Wonderbug gang visits a ghost town; Dr. Shrinker monkeys around with Shrinkies; and Electra Woman and Dyna Girl meet The Sorcerer. Kaptain Kool and the Kongs introduce themselves in a song, sing "Get Dancin'," and star in a few skits.

episodes.title: Episode #1.8
episodes.overview: Wonderbug meets Bigfoot; the Shrinkies eat berries which make them invisible; an evil Dyna Girl battles Electra Woman, and the Lost Saucer returns to Fi and Fum's home planet.
